title: Perplexity takes its 'Computer' AI agent into the enterprise, taking aim at Microsoft and Salesforce
body: Perplexity announced Computer for Enterprise at its Ask 2026 developer conference, launching a multi-model AI agent with Slack integration, Snowflake connectors, and 20 orchestrated AI models to compete directly with Microsoft Copilot and Salesforce in the $139 billion agentic AI market.

title: Data Product Agent Mesh: Where Data Mesh Meets AI to Solve Enterprise Data's Biggest Challenges
body: Data Product Agent Mesh makes the promise of Data Mesh practical by solving its operational complexity through intelligent automation. It makes AI's potential concrete by grounding agentic capabilities in well-defined domain contexts with clear governance boundaries.

title: Enterprises Are Deploying AI Agents Without Governing Their Access
body: Enterprises are deploying AI agents that act like employees—with access rights, permissions, and the ability to cause real damage. Identity governance hasn't caught up.

title: Can your enterprise network keep up with its agents?
body: The challenges to long-established business practices, security, and enterprise infrastructure are enormous but CIOs need to ready for the next wave of AI-driven innovation, which will bring even greater pressures to bear.

title: Microsoft expands Copilot with Agentic AI for enterprise automation
body: Microsoft expands Copilot with Agentic AI for enterprise automation, introducing Copilot Cowork that can plan tasks, generate reports, manage meetings, and execute workflows across Microsoft 365.

title: Multi-Agent AI Systems: The Architectural Shift Reshaping Enterprise Computing
body: Dhruv Roongta is the Co-Founder & CTO of Slashy, a startup building general AI agents.
